educationMatch.explanation: Master's degree from Zhejiang University in EE/Automation meets and exceeds the Bachelor's degree requirement. EE/Automation is directly relevant to infrastructure and platform engineering work.

experienceMatch.explanation: 26 total years of experience far exceeds 12+ year requirement. Management years from resume_experiences: Mainet PM (2000-2007, 7yr) + eBay Team Lead (2007-2012, 4.7yr) + eBay CCOE SDM (2012-2017, 5yr) + eBay SDM App Lifecycle (2017-2023, 6.5yr) + eBay SDM Cloud Fleet (2023-present, 2.5yr) = 25.7 years management, massively exceeding the 6+ year requirement.

missingSkills: AWS (candidate has private cloud/K8s experience, not explicitly AWS)
Python and Go (not explicitly mentioned in resume)
skillMatch.explanation: Extremely strong match on core infrastructure and platform skills. Kubernetes expertise is deep: 100+ clusters, 2M+ pods, custom operators/controllers. Owned REST API platform serving 35,000+ deployments/week for thousands of engineers. Built full CI/CD platform with Tekton. Led provisioning systems reducing time from days to minutes. Minor gaps: AWS not explicitly mentioned, and Python/Go not called out.

responsibilityMatch.explanation: Near-perfect responsibility match. Led 20+ engineers across US/China teams. Set K8s architectural standards for 5,000+ app migrations. Owned REST API platform for enterprise-scale infrastructure. Built provisioning system reducing time from days to under 10 minutes. Drove 75% deployment time reduction via automation. Coordinated with security, network, product, and capacity stakeholders. Established SRE practices, runbooks, and documentation site.

softSkillMatch.explanation: Strong soft skills demonstrated throughout. 20+ year management trajectory. Coaching shown in Yiran growing story (senior engineer promoted to staff). Conflict resolution demonstrated in AZ rebalance manager conflict scenario. Strategic thinking evident in cluster automation vision and phased roadmap planning. Built global teams in Europe and India. Regular stakeholder alignment across security, infrastructure, product, and capacity teams.

strengths: Master's degree from Zhejiang University exceeds the Bachelor's requirement
25+ years of management experience (4x the required 6+) with consistent progression from Team Lead to SDM
Deep Kubernetes expertise at massive scale: 100+ clusters, 2M+ pods, custom operators/controllers, admission webhooks
Directly owned infrastructure REST API platform serving 35,000+ deployments/week for thousands of engineers
Proven large-scale data center automation: reduced provisioning from days to under 10 minutes
Strong SRE track record: improved system reliability from under 90% to 99%+ in 2-3 months
Cloud Native migration at enterprise scale: 5,000+ applications migrated to Kubernetes
Recent global team building: established engineering teams in Europe and India, hired 8+ engineers
